narrative_arc: five friends + a guy hang out -> a glowing magic book materializes -> each person reads it in turn and muscle-grows (round-robin) -> growth escalates to peak nudity/strain across a gym session -> scene resets to an apartment, more reading + arguing -> the book yields a golden gauntlet artifact -> two women power up in a glowing climax -> they emerge as caped red-and-white muscle-heroes and fly off (to be continued)

panels.notes: Title cover: three women reach up toward a glowing floating book; low angle, radiant FG book vs smaller bodies receding below. Title logo + 'Art by Boogie / Story by Cribble / GrowGetterComics.com'.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=1; flat_panel_count=0; strong reaching-upward composition, clear promise = the book causes something. No growth yet.

panels.notes: Establishing living room: bearded guy in FG left (larger), four women on the couch in BG. Good depth, lots of empty dialogue balloons.
Three women lean in, chatting; level eyeline, casual.
Trio seated, talking; flat row of heads.
Near-repeat of panel 3 from a hair-different angle; conversation, no camera movement.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=2; flat_panel_count=3; pure setup. Panels 2-4 are a flat-level conversation block with empty balloons (lettering stripped from source).

panels.notes: A bright light/portal blooms upper right (SHIING!), women turn toward it. The catalyst arrives.
The glowing book has materialized standing on a surface, FG right; women recoil on couch BG.
High wide of the group clustered, looking at the now-closed book on the floor across the room. Good use of high angle for the 'what is that' beat.
Three women react, leaning together.
Blonde CU holding the book, awed/curious. Nice push-in to close the page on the person who'll read first.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=4 (MS/MLS/WS/CU); flat_panel_count=2; the trigger page. SHIING! sells the magical arrival; closing CU on the blonde sets up the first reader. Counts toward growth ratio (trigger).

panels.notes: Book passed/grabbed across frame, motion arc + 'Swipe!'. Three women staged left-to-right at varied distances.
Black-haired woman in teal opens the book, reading aloud; standing, pleased.
Reader centered holding the open book toward camera, two friends framing her at smaller scale behind. Good big-FG / smaller-others staging.
Trio with the book between them, talking; flat row.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=2; flat_panel_count=2; buildup, the reading begins but no body change yet, so growth_state=none. Panel 3 is a clean scale-contrast composition worth noting.

panels.notes: Book slams open/down on table (KRETHUNK!), FG left; reaction in BG.
First transformation onset: teal-hoodie woman tips head back, chest beginning to swell; low angle. Strong head-back ecstasy face sells the start.
She throws arms up as chest/torso expands; two friends recoil at smaller scale, radiating motion lines. Good scale-contrast + onlooker reactions.
She flexes a bicep; friend reacts on a diagonal axis across frame.
Lower body swells (glutes/thighs straining leggings); brunette friend reacts. Growth distributed across body parts panel-to-panel.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=2; flat_panel_count=0; FIRST transformation. KRETHUNK! triggers it, then four growth-focus panels rotate chest->arms->glutes with reaction-intercut. Radiant color-burst backgrounds amp energy. Good early-growth page.

panels.notes: Head-back ecstasy, chest ballooning; low-hero angle, book glowing on table FG. Mid-growth heat.
Grown woman double-biceps flex, grinning; friend reaches in at smaller scale. Money flex beat.
She crouches/reaches toward a friend recoiling on the floor; diagonal action.
Blonde reaction OTS the grown woman; the next-reader thread continues.
Grown woman hands/offers the glowing book up toward the blonde (FG), seen from a high 3/4. Book handoff = round-robin engine.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=2; flat_panel_count=0; mid-growth + the book begins its pass to the next reader. Consistent low-hero on the grower, scale-contrast against onlookers.

panels.notes: Blonde CU shushing/smiling as she takes a turn; little swipe SFX.
Blonde's torso erupts, shirt straining, RIPPP x2; arm thrust toward camera (foreshortening). First clothing-destruction beat. Strong.
Two friends react in FG, blonde growing in mid-ground; staggered scale.
High 3/4 over the group huddled around the book; transitional.
Grown blonde (now large) in red FG vs the others holding the book; size differential established.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=3 (CU/MS/MLS); flat_panel_count=0; the RIPPP clothing-destruction debut (panel 2) is the page's best growth beat. Foreshortened reaching limb adds depth.

panels.notes: Book handed off again (SWIPE!) across the frame to the muscular blonde in red. Pass-the-book continues.
Two grown women face-to-face, big-FG head + smaller second; conversational but well-staged scale.
Blonde's chest now hugely strained in red (FG), others reading behind. Continued swell.
Three grown women walk toward a doorway in a hall; doorframe = size-comparison reference for how big they now are.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=3 (MCU/MS/WS); flat_panel_count=0; transition page moving the group to a new location (gym). Panel 4's doorway gives a fixed size reference.

panels.notes: Home-gym establishing: bearded guy FG left, grown women across the room, one curling a loaded barbell at right. Deep stage, varied sizes.
Guy + two women talking, book in view; the man is now visibly part of the group dynamic.
Close on a woman curling the heavy bar, biceps straining (GREEAGH); effort registered. Best beat on the page.
Lifter mid-curl while another reads at right; diagonal energy. Demonstrates the new strength.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=2; flat_panel_count=0; gym sequence showing off acquired strength. GREEAGH effort SFX + straining biceps are the growth content; otherwise more dialogue.

panels.notes: Bearded guy stands tall pointing at himself (low-hero), women seated reading at left smaller. He's about to take a turn.
Two women grin over the book; conversational.
The MAN now transforms: shirtless pec/torso swelling, RIPPP, woman reading beside him. Male grower introduced as a variant.
Grown shirtless man FG left, women holding book center, big-FG-head onlooker (afro woman) right. Three-depth scale staging.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=2; flat_panel_count=1; the male character also grows (RIPPP, panel 3). Round-robin now includes him. Good scale-contrast across depths.

panels.notes: Lineup wide: women + now-huge shirtless man at right; bodies at markedly different scales. Roster check.
Blonde grips her straining top (RIPP), grinning; friend bends/reacts on a diagonal behind.
ECU on afro woman's awed eyes, low. Reaction-intercut close-up - rare ECU, good.
Blonde's top bursts fully (RIIPPP x2), peak ecstasy face, low-hero with friend recoiling below. Clothing-destruction climax of this round; first full topless beat.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=3 (WS/MS/ECU/MCU); flat_panel_count=0; escalation tightening. Panel 3 ECU + panel 4 burst are the page's heat; zoom pushes in as growth peaks.

panels.notes: Two peak-muscle women embrace/lean, massive; man's arm FG. Pile-up of grown bodies.
Bench-press station, the man spotting; grown women crowding. Busy, slightly hard to parse who's who.
High 3/4 over a clustered group at peak size; the room is now full of muscle.
Blonde on the bench at peak, head back screaming with joy, towering chest in foreshortened low-hero. Climactic money panel.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=2; flat_panel_count=0; PEAK round-1 muscle. Panels are dense/crowded (clarity dips) but the low-hero closer (4) lands. Heavy nudity handled clinically here.

panels.notes: Peak blonde laughing/panting, ripped abs + chest filling frame, low-hero. HAH HAH carries breath/sensation.
Tight on flexed arm/torso, barbell behind; the body is the subject now.
ECU on straining muscle detail; KREEEEK = the creak of the bench/body under load. SFX carries sensation, no face.
The man grimacing/straining (HNGGK) as he holds/spots; effort registered on him.
Blonde CU, head thrown back, mouth wide in ecstasy. Peak expression - this is the dead-face axis done RIGHT.
CRASSHH - the bench/equipment shatters under her; arm thrust out, debris. SFX-driven structural payoff of the strain build.
Three peak bodies in a row from behind/side, aftermath of the crash; sizes contrasted.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=4 (MCU/CU/ECU/MS); flat_panel_count=0; THE BEST PAGE. A 7-panel SFX cascade HAH->KREEEEK->HNGGK->CRASSHH walks strain to structural failure with zero dialogue. Expressions peak (5s). Steal this page's sound design.

panels.notes: Wreckage wide: two peak women standing over the destroyed bench + the man flattened on the floor. Aftermath staging with depth.
Blonde laughing, peak chest in low-hero; basking.
Full front double-biceps FLEX, symmetric hero pose. Full-body-reveal of this round's result. Iconic beat.
High insert of a hand reaching for the book on the floor. Quiet beat resetting the device.
Peak women cradling more bodies, the man passed out; the book picked back up. Bridges to the next scene.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=3 (WS/MCU/MS/CU); flat_panel_count=0; aftermath + the front double-biceps reveal (panel 3). Insert on the book (panel 4) is a clean device-reset cut.

panels.notes: New scene, apartment living room, high wide: three permanently-grown women lounging (green/orange/pink). Re-establish on a fresh day. Good deep stage.
Split staging: blonde (orange) holds the open book and reads it again, the afro woman gesturing/arguing at left. The book returns.
Blonde's torso swells again (RIPP), arm thrown out; two others recoil at smaller scale. Round-2 onset.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=2; flat_panel_count=0; SCENE RESET + round-2 trigger. The book is read again, re-igniting growth on the established cast. Only 3 panels = brisk re-entry.

panels.notes: Blonde (orange) clutching swelling chest (FWOOMP!), low-hero, book in hand. Size-impact SFX debuts.
Chest pumps bigger (BAAAM!), grinning, book held out. Impact-SFX growth.
High rear 3/4: glutes/thighs surge (BAAAM!). Lower-body growth gets its own impact beat. No face.
Full pump: flexing, chest straining (RIPP x2), heartbeat BA-BUMP!, biceps flexed, book in hand. Layered SFX stack.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=2; flat_panel_count=0; SFX-DRIVEN round-2 growth - FWOOMP/BAAAM/BA-BUMP! give each surge an audible punch. Body parts rotate chest->glutes->chest. Strong device page.

panels.notes: Grown blonde flexes, satisfied; settled at new size.
She moves to a door, towering; dark-haired head FG (OTS) for scale.
Her huge hand grips/crushes the doorframe (CRUNK!), little stress lines. Strength gag; doorframe = size reference.
She leans through the doorway, arm reaching toward camera; barely fits the frame (scale via architecture).
Two other grown women stand crossed-armed in a room, book on the table between them. Reset to talk.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=3 (MS/CU/WS); flat_panel_count=0; aftermath - shows off the new size against doorways (CRUNK! size-comparison gag). Transitions toward the argument.

panels.notes: Caption 'A little later...'. Green-shirt woman gestures, pink-shirt woman across; book on table. Confrontation staged in depth.
Pink-shirt woman holds her head, exasperated; green-shirt gestures OTS. Argument.
Continuation, faces closer; tension rising.
Pink-shirt woman bares teeth, angry CU; green-shirt smaller behind. Emotional peak of the spat.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=3 (MS/MCU/CU); flat_panel_count=0; pure dialogue/argument, no growth (state=none). Expression carries it - rises from shock to rage (panel 4). A talk page that earns its place via escalating faces.

panels.notes: Over the afro woman's shoulder to the brunette, who smirks. Conversation continues.
Brunette (pink) gestures, grown; framed FG against the other.
Green-shirt woman (huge) FG, brunette gesturing; size contrast emphasized but static.
High 3/4 over the two reaching toward the book on the table. Re-arming for the next read.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=2; flat_panel_count=0; more dialogue, no growth. Pacing sags here (P18-21 are talk-heavy) but staging stays varied via OTS + scale-contrast. Book re-targeted at end.

panels.notes: Green-shirt woman head-back holding book to chest (still huge), brunette reaching in; residual swell but mainly posing.
Brunette FG, afro woman reacting; conversational.
Afro woman holds the book, smiling, OTS the brunette. Handing it forward again.
The man (huge) sits reading the book at right, brunette over him. Book changing hands into the gauntlet sub-plot.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=2; flat_panel_count=0; transitional dialogue moving the book toward its next function. Growth-adjacent (panel 1) but no active change; state=none.

panels.notes: Brunette (pink) hands the book toward the seated afro woman (green); deep stage. Setting up a private read.
High 3/4 of the afro woman opening the book on a couch, pink-shirt arm reaching in. Intimate scale.
Closer high on her hands flat on the open book + a glossy illustrated page (the artifact reveal begins).
High wide of the open book glowing + a second illustrated spread; a golden object pictured. Plants the gauntlet.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=2; flat_panel_count=0; quiet buildup - the book reveals a new artifact (a glowing glove). All high angles looking down at the book; no growth. Sets up the climax.

panels.notes: A golden gauntlet/glove materializes on the open book, a hand reaching for it (FG). The new catalyst object.
Afro woman holds the gauntlet up, brunette reaching to take/share it. Two-hander over the artifact.
Brunette begins pulling the gauntlet onto her hand/forearm; afro woman holds another. Donning the device.
Both women now wearing golden gauntlets, examining their hands. Armed and ready - trigger primed.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=2; flat_panel_count=0; the gauntlet (a NEW transformation device beyond the book) is donned. No body change yet, but this is the catalyst beat -> growth_state=trigger. Introduces variety so round-3 doesn't repeat rounds 1-2.

panels.notes: Afro woman raises the gauntleted fist, it ignites with light (GLOW), green energy streaks behind, low-hero. Power-up initiated.
Head tipped back, chest surging in golden light (FWOOMP!), inset panel. Artifact-driven growth onset.
Golden energy ribbons wrap her swelling back/torso (BAAAM!), arm thrust out. Dramatic light-FX growth - new visual flavor.
Eyes shut, panting/ecstatic mid-power-up, golden energy swirling. Peak expression + peak FX combine.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=2; flat_panel_count=0; PEAK round-3 via the gauntlet. Golden energy ribbons + GLOW/FWOOMP/BAAAM make this transformation feel different from the book-reads (superhero origin energy). Expressions hit 5.

panels.notes: Brunette raises her glowing gauntlet (GLOW), confident grin, energy behind. Her power-up starts.
Head back, mouth open, panting (AHHHH/HAH HAH) as it takes hold.
Bare chest surging at peak; the growth itself centered (clinical anatomy beat).
Golden ribbons wrap her expanding torso (BAAAM!); matches P23's device. Lats/back flaring.
Tight low CU, screaming with energy enveloping her (AHHHHH). Climactic peak face closing the transformation.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=3 (MS/CU/MCU); flat_panel_count=0; second gauntlet power-up mirrors P23. Strong climactic faces (5s). The two-women parallel sets up the team reveal.

panels.notes: Splash: two finished caped muscle-heroines in matching red-and-white costumes + golden gauntlets, floating/flying on a diagonal, both laughing triumphantly (HAHAHA!!!). 'to be continued...' box bottom right. Full-body-reveal payoff + cliffhanger.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=1; flat_panel_count=0; the closing splash - the book/gauntlet arc resolves into a superhero-team reveal and flies off. Clean full-body-reveal + pull-forward to ch.2. Best single composition of the book (low-hero diagonal flight).

strengths: P13 is a 7-panel SFX cascade (HAH/HAH -> KREEEEK -> HNGGK -> CRASSHH) that walks muscle strain all the way to the bench shattering with ZERO dialogue - sound design alone carries the growth sensation and structural payoff. The single best page to steal.

Consistent low-hero angle + foreshortening on every grower (P5 p2, P6 p1, P11 p4, P12 p4, P13 p1, P16, P23-24) makes the transforming character physically tower over the camera - the opposite of the pipeline's flat-level default.
Layered impact-SFX growth on P16 (FWOOMP! / BAAAM! / BA-BUMP! / RIPP) gives each surge an audible punch and rotates body-part focus chest->glutes->chest across one page.

The book is a round-robin engine: a SWIPE!/Swipe! handoff (P4, P8) passes it person-to-person so each cast member grows in turn (P5 teal woman, P7 blonde, P10 the man, P15-16 orange blonde), generating a slow-burn that spans 10 pages instead of one-and-done.

Escalation in transformation device, not just size: book-reads (rounds 1-2) graduate to a glowing golden gauntlet (P22-24) whose energy-ribbon FX read as a superhero origin, keeping round 3 visually fresh.
Peak faces genuinely land - P13 p5 and P24 p5 hit head-back open-mouth ecstasy/scream at intensity 5, exactly the register a money-shot demands.
P25 closing splash (low-hero diagonal flight, two caped heroines, HAHAHA!!! + 'to be continued') is a clean full-body-reveal payoff and an effective pull-forward to ch.2.
Clothing-destruction is staged as a clear escalation ladder: a single RIPPP (P7) -> RIIPPP x2 burst (P11) -> shredded-to-nude peak (P12-13), so the reader feels the growth outpacing the garments.
weaknesses: ALL dialogue balloons are empty in this source scan - P2 and P18-21 are talk-heavy pages with no readable text, so the social/argument beats land as dead air. As a craft note the script leans heavily on lettering the corpus can't see; the visuals alone make P18-21 drag.
Pages 18-21 are four near-consecutive dialogue pages (~16 panels) with no active growth - a long sag between the round-2 peak (P17) and the gauntlet climax (P23). Pacing stalls in the middle third.
Crowded peak panels hurt clarity: P12 p2-3 and P13 p7 pile 3-4 near-identical peak bodies into one frame so it's hard to tell who is who or who is growing. The money pages get muddy.

Distance spread is narrow per page - most pages live in the MS/MCU band (P6, P9, P10, P16, P19, P20 never leave it); true wides (EWS) are absent and ECUs are rare (only P11 p3, P13 p3), so zoom-escalation is underused relative to how much growth there is.
Setup faces are underplayed - P2 p3-4 and several conversation panels sit at intensity 2 (mild/neutral) when a magic-book mystery should register more curiosity or unease on the page-1-2 hook.
Repetition of staging: the 'grower head-back + onlooker reaching in at smaller scale' composition recurs many times (P5, P6, P11, P16, P20, P23) - effective but formulaic by the third round.
The man's transformation (P10 p3) is introduced and then mostly sidelined into a spotter/comic-relief role (P12-14) without its own payoff, a dropped thread.
No establishing EWS anywhere - locations (living room, gym, second apartment) are only ever implied via MS/WS fragments, so spatial geography between the three scenes is loose.
